titles.text: Higurashi no Naku Koro ni Kizuna: Alternative Hirukowashi-hen
ひぐらしのなく頃に絆 異本・昼壊し編

descriptions.text: An alternative version of Hirukowashi-hen originally included in Higurashi When They Cry Kai, which contains several changes, namely the addition and removal of certain characters and the removal of references to plot details not yet revealed in the Kizuna series.
